headline: Oppenheimer Raises Verizon (VZ) Price Target to $56 on Subscriber Growth Outlook
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) is included among the 15 Best Dividend Leaders to Buy Right Now. On March 11, Oppenheimer raised its price recommendation on Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) to $56 from $50. It reiterated an Outperform rating on the shares. The firm said its channel checks suggest Verizon’s subscriber growth share is continuing. The […]
